Very good resort. The staff, both on the beach and in the shop, were excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNGczZxWUVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy linda arboleda para el.lugar de descanso. Un poco deteriorados los bancos. El lugar está súper limpio. Hay un resto parrilla, pero estaba cerrada cuando llegamos. El espacio de venta está bien surtido, uno de los empleados un poco sobrador ante una consulta respecto a un precio del área panadería/sandwich. Luego la gente muy cordial.

(Translated by Google)
A lovely grove of trees makes for a great rest area. The benches are a bit worn. The place is super clean. There's a grill restaurant, but it was closed when we arrived. The shop is well-stocked; one of the employees was a bit arrogant when we asked about prices in the bakery/sandwich area. Otherwise, the staff was very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1c2ZLMFJnEAE
